independent.interpretation: Provider reached the exact model pin but returned stop_reason=refusal; this is not model unavailability. The visual generation gate still requires fresh independent Fable outputs and fails closed if they do not complete.

fixes.finding: pixel grounding was not measured while extracted text was supplied
fixes.resolution: Frontier author and review payloads now contain only immutable PNG bytes and page labels; extracted text remains audit-only in the packet.

fixes.finding: topic and focus pages were not acceptance criteria
fixes.resolution: Local citation validation accepts only focus_pages; cross-review receives the frozen topic/focus and must assert topic_aligned.

fixes.finding: material disagreement between independent candidates was not evaluated
fixes.resolution: Both candidates are shown only after independent generation; each reviewer must report counterpart_materially_agrees and an empty material_disagreements list.

fixes.finding: novelty relied on basename and question text
fixes.resolution: All 78 source hashes resolved from existing gold citations are compared, and reviewers receive every existing question plus atomic facts for semantic duplicate screening.

fixes.finding: last-call budget and paid failed-call accounting were not fail-closed
fixes.resolution: An immutable call ledger is written immediately after every provider response, the budget is checked after the final Fable call, and HOLD/NO-GO costs use the ledger.

fixes.finding: INSUFFICIENT was misclassified as provider HOLD
fixes.resolution: Semantic insufficiency now raises SemanticNoGo and closes as NO_GO_VISUAL_GOLD.

fixes.finding: future bot evaluation lacked a complete freeze contract
fixes.resolution: A canary GO only authorizes a new preregistration binding corpus, index, embeddings, full configuration, judge, seeds, baseline and zero-regression thresholds.

fixes.finding: product-manual inventory was a hand-maintained assertion
fixes.resolution: The builder discovers product manuals by frozen document/model tokens across all 55 Kidde PDFs and fails on any declared/discovered mismatch.
